concepts.headline: 900+ Stars in 48 Hours
concepts.subtext: Mike, the open source legal AI, launched and already has 200+ forks and community-built extensions live.
concepts.layout_description: Dark background canvas (#111111). Centered layout. Large '900+' stat in chartreuse (#e6ff00) at 72px dominates upper half. 'Stars in 48 Hours' in white Inter 500 at 48px below. Thin chartreuse horizontal rule separates stat from subtext. Subtext in muted gray (#888) at 18px. Small 'mikeoss.com' URL pill badge in bottom right with chartreuse border. Flywheel wordmark bottom left.
concepts.color_usage: Dark background #111111, chartreuse #e6ff00 for the large stat number and accent rule, white for headline text, #888 for subtext, warm border #d7c8af for pill badge
concepts.reasoning: The 900+ stars in 48 hours is a striking, singular metric that anchors the story. A headline card with a dominant number creates immediate visual impact for a launch announcement.

concepts.headline: Mike: Open Source Legal AI Milestones
concepts.subtext: 48 hours post-launch. Community already building on top.
data_points: Local deployments for secure legal workflows
concepts.layout_description: Warm off-white canvas (#faf9f6). Left-aligned header block with title in black Inter 700 at 32px. Below, four numbered row cards stacked vertically in a max 640px column centered on canvas. Each row has a chartreuse square badge with bold black number, a short bold title in 16px black, and a one-line descriptor in 13px gray (#666). Left accent border in chartreuse on each row card. Generous 48px outer padding.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, row cards #f0efe9 with chartreuse #e6ff00 left border accents, number badges in #e6ff00 with #000000 text, titles in #000000, descriptors in #666
concepts.reasoning: The post contains four distinct, sequentially compelling milestones. A numbered list gives each fact equal visual weight and communicates the momentum of the launch at a glance.

concepts.headline: Mike Is Live: Open Source Legal AI
concepts.subtext: Run legal workflows locally, extend with APIs, and contribute to the fastest-growing open source legal tool.
concepts.layout_description: Dark card (#1a1a1a) centered on warm off-white canvas (#faf9f6) with drop shadow. Bold header block at top with 'Mike Is Live' in white 700 at 36px and tagline in chartreuse at 16px. Below, a two-column detail grid: left column shows star and fork counts as icon-label pairs in white with chartreuse icons; right column shows '48 hrs' launch time and 'Local + Secure' deployment badge. CTA button at bottom reading 'mikeoss.com' styled in black on chartreuse (#e6ff00) with 6px border radius. Pill badges for 'CourtListener API' and 'Local Deploy' in muted gray.
concepts.color_usage: Card background #1a1a1a, canvas #faf9f6, headline text white, chartreuse #e6ff00 for tagline and CTA button fill, icon accents in #e6ff00, pill badges in #333 with #888 text
concepts.reasoning: Framing the launch as a structured event card emphasizes actionability and directs viewers to mikeoss.com, making it useful for driving traffic alongside the announcement.

selection_reasoning: The headline card anchors on the single most compelling data point: 900+ stars in 48 hours. It creates maximum visual impact with minimal cognitive load, which performs best in LinkedIn feeds. The dominant chartreuse stat on a dark background is instantly eye-catching and communicates viral momentum without requiring the viewer to read further.
